metadata.title: CGE-P Labs System Security Plan
metadata.remarks: Complete SSP for 12 CGE-P certification labs across AWS

system-characteristics.description: Production-grade Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC) platform demonstrating Infrastructure-as-Code, Policy-as-Code, Evidence-as-Code, and Compliance-as-Code principles

information-types.title: Compliance Evidence
information-types.description: Audit evidence collected from infrastructure demonstrating control implementations

information-types.title: Configuration Data
information-types.description: Infrastructure configuration in Terraform code stored in Git repository

information-types.title: Audit Logs
information-types.description: CloudTrail, Config, GuardDuty, VPC Flow Logs capturing all system activity

users.description: Manages AWS infrastructure and compliance monitoring
Reviews evidence and compliance status for audit

components.description: Foundation: Two encrypted S3 buckets with versioning, logging, public access blocks
Automated daily evidence collection from Lab 2.3, archived to S3, metadata in DynamoDB
Multi-service security: CloudTrail, GuardDuty, IAM policies, VPC Flow Logs, Config Rules
Governance automation: Daily compliance scoring, control status tracking, SNS notifications
Evidence integrity: DynamoDB chain of custody table, CloudWatch audit logs (10-year retention)

control-implementation.description: Controls implemented across CGE-P labs for NIST 800-53 compliance

implemented-controls.implementation: Lab 2.3: S3 AES-256 encryption | Lab 2.5: DynamoDB KMS encryption, evidence archive KMS | Lab 5.2: Secrets Manager encrypted storage

implemented-controls.control-statement: Audit events shall include user and device identification, timestamp, event type, outcome
implemented-controls.implementation: Lab 2.3: S3 access logging | Lab 2.5: Evidence metadata table | Lab 5.2: CloudTrail multi-region | Lab 4.4: Chain of custody logs
Lab 5.2: CloudWatch log analysis, SNS alerts | Lab 4.3: Daily GRC pipeline review | Lab 4.4: Access audit trail
Lab 2.3: S3 public access blocks | Lab 5.2: IAM least privilege policies | Lab 4.4: Evidence access logging
Lab 5.2: Custom IAM policies granting only required S3 permissions | CloudTrail logging all privilege escalation attempts
Lab 2.3: S3 versioning enabled | Lab 5.2: Infrastructure-as-Code in Terraform | Lab 4.3: Configuration baseline tracking
Lab 4.3: Daily compliance scoring via EventBridge orchestration | CloudWatch dashboards | Control status DynamoDB table

implemented-controls.control-statement: Monitor system for attack and unauthorized activity
implemented-controls.implementation: Lab 5.2: GuardDuty ML-based threat detection | VPC Flow Logs network monitoring | CloudTrail API monitoring
Lab 2.5: SHA256 hash verification, Lambda verifier | Lab 4.4: DynamoDB PITR, S3 versioning, chain of custody

implemented-controls.control-statement: Generate, record, and retain audit records
implemented-controls.implementation: Lab 4.4: Chain of custody DynamoDB table, CloudWatch logs (10-year retention), immutable audit trail

implemented-controls.control-statement: Handle and retain information in accordance with applicable requirements
implemented-controls.implementation: Lab 4.4: 7-year evidence retention with automatic expiration via TTL, S3 lifecycle policies archive to Glacier
Lab 4.4: Chain of custody tracks evidence flow between components, EventBridge orchestration logs system interactions
Lab 5.2: IAM account password policy enforced (14+ chars, symbols, 90-day expiry, 24-history)

implemented-controls.control-statement: Monitor and control communications at external boundaries
implemented-controls.implementation: Lab 5.2: VPC Flow Logs capture all network traffic, S3 bucket policies restrict access to specific principals

assessment-results.details: All 14 NIST 800-53 controls mapped to CGE-P lab implementations verified and operational
